summary: Wrote full KILLSHOT-GAIA section with explicit numeric chain. Dome wobble (0.454 arcsec for ALL stars) vs Gaia DR3 observations (1-768 mas, 760x range). Proxima Centauri alone rejects at 6,281σ. Includes: 5-star comparison table, adjacent-star structural argument, n(r) displacement chain (1,497x atmosphere → 9 billion sigma), New Horizons independent confirmation, aetheric refraction escape hatch closed, 4 anticipated objections. Proposed as new Test 7 in part5 kill-shots. Decider decides final placement. Newsworthy: 6,281σ is the most statistically devastating single test in the entire review.
